procedures.name: Add key
procedures.method: Select only after generation, exact dashboard and keyed/keyless configuration are identified
procedures.online_requirement: tool and fitted-system dependent; not verified

tool_evidence.supports: Official Autel coverage states APB300 reads immobiliser data from a working MLB/MQB key and lists Audi A1 2019-2021.
tool_evidence.limits: Requires a working key; does not establish AKL support, RHD location or every keyed/keyless variant.

tool_evidence.supports: The manual names Audi A1 in a service-mode login category, but does not by itself verify every A1 dashboard, generation, UK vehicle or keyed/keyless operation.

procedures.name: All keys lost
procedures.method: No generic A1 AKL route is verified
procedures.conflict_note: The Xhorse manual describes login-type-dependent AKL behaviour. Exact dashboard identification is required, so model-wide inheritance is prohibited.
